svg.aria-label: First self-replicating worm in npm ecosystem Shai-Hulud compromises over 180 packages, propagation mechanism via stolen tokens, infection detection guide with SBOM and 2FA enforcement for open-source supply chain.
svg.title: 2025-09-17: NPM Shai-Hulud worm, 180+ packages, first self-replicating

g.text: Worm payload : steal NPM_TOKEN : re-publish to next...
Stage1 token exfil : Stage2 enumerate maintainer pkgs :...
env NPM_TOKEN steal : list maintainer packages :...
Auto-enumerate maintainer scope : silent version bump...
npm whoami + npm access ls : publish patch with worm...
2FA on publish : SBOM CycloneDX : npm audit...
Sigstore signing : SLSA Level 3 build : provenance...
